item.title: NizaarKinsella: Nizaar Kinsella @NizaarKinsella · 20s It's crazy that Chelsea haven't scored yet. It's all them against United. An offsi
item.description: Nizaar Kinsella @NizaarKinsella · 20s It's crazy that Chelsea haven't scored yet. It's all them against United. An offside goal and Neto's cross just hits Fernandez in the back as he doesn't time his run well. 2 24 33 276

item.description:

Spurs must see positives despite cruel blow Maddison makes long awaited return Simons has magic moment stolen away De standard.co.uk 8
